name: Computer Science & Engineering
description: Comprehensive study of computer systems, software development, data science, algorithms, and smart systems design.

name: Information Technology
description: Focuses on software solutions, database systems, networking, cloud computing, and web engineering principles.

name: Artificial Intelligence & Data Science
description: Advanced training in machine learning models, data analytics, predictive systems, computer vision, and neural networks.

name: Electronics & Communication Engineering
description: Syllabus covers semiconductor devices, digital systems, signal processing, VLSI design, and telecommunications.

name: Electrical & Electronics Engineering
description: Covers high-voltage power networks, electrical machinery, control systems, and power electronics design.

name: Mechanical Engineering
description: Foundations of thermodynamics, structural mechanics, fluid dynamics, manufacturing systems, and machine design.

name: Civil Engineering
description: Studies structural engineering, geotechnical analysis, fluid mechanics, surveying, and sustainable architecture.

name: Master of Computer Applications
description: Advanced postgraduate course covering software architectures, design patterns, database management, and enterprise app building.

name: Bachelor of Computer Applications
description: Undergraduate curriculum featuring programming fundamentals, operating systems, databases, and network administration.

name: B.Tech General (Common Semesters)
description: Syllabus for B.Tech First Year (Semester 1 and 2) common to all engineering branches under IPU regulations.

name: Master of Business Administration
description: Covers marketing management, corporate finance, strategic management, organizational behavior, and international business.

name: Biotechnology
description: Study of cellular biology, bioinformatics, genetic engineering, micro-biology, and process control systems.
